title: NSE & BSE Market Data Scraper
description: Collect live market data from NSE India and BSE India using confirmed JSON endpoints.

dataType.title: Data Type
dataType.description: Choose the market data category to collect.

source.title: Exchange
source.description: Choose NSE, BSE, or both exchanges.

symbols.title: Symbols or BSE Scrip Codes
symbols.description: Equity symbols to collect, such as RELIANCE, INFY, HDFCBANK, or a BSE scrip code like 500325. Used only for equity data.

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of records per exchange/category.
